data.title: Scalable Video Delivery
data.description: YouTube employs a global content delivery network to ensure fast video streaming.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CDNs distributed worldwide for low latency content delivery.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decomposes the application into smaller, independently deployable services.
data.technical_spec: REST APIs connect various microservices for seamless user interaction and data management.

data.title: Large-Scale Data Management
data.description: Handles vast amounts of user and video data using efficient storage and retrieval strategies.
data.technical_spec: Bigtable and Spanner databases ensure consistency and quick access to data.

data.title: Full-Text Search Algorithms
data.description: Allows efficient search through billions of videos to deliver relevant results.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes inverted indexing and advanced search algorithms to retrieve video metadata.

data.title: Adaptive Bitrate Streaming
data.description: Automates video quality adjustments to match the user's internet speed.
data.technical_spec: MPEG-DASH and HTTP Live Streaming (HLS) protocols optimize video playback experience.
